articles.title: Liftoff! NASA Launches Astronauts on Historic Artemis Moon Mission
articles.description: Spurred by American ingenuity, astronauts on NASA’s Artemis II mission are in flight, preparing for the first crewed lunar flyby in more than 50 years.
